description: Koi clan bidding overlay: dynamically update available ronin count as coins are bid
steps: 1. In src/components/BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx, the Koi clan's available ronin equals their coins minus the coins currently assigned to tactics. Currently the overlay shows a static playerRonin value. For Koi, this should be dynamic: as the player drags coins to tactic slots, the displayed ronin count should decrease accordingly.
2. Add a prop to BattleBiddingOverlay: `isKoiClan?: boolean` (or detect from playerClanId === 'koi').

3. In the header section where playerRonin is displayed (around line 195), if the player is Koi, calculate the dynamic ronin as: playerRonin - totalAssigned (where totalAssigned = number of coins placed on any tactic). Display this computed value instead of the static playerRonin.

4. In BattlePanel.tsx where playerRonin is passed to BattleBiddingOverlay (around lines 681 and 748), for Koi players the passed value is already `player.coins`. The dynamic calculation in the overlay will subtract coins assigned to tactics from this base value to show remaining available ronin.
acceptance_criteria: When a Koi player moves coins to tactic slots in the bidding overlay, the displayed ronin count decreases by the same amount
When a Koi player moves coins back to the pool, the displayed ronin count increases back
Non-Koi players see their static ronin count unchanged
npm run build succeeds without errors
